backend/main.mo: Motoko canister performing DCF valuation with input validation, annual and terminal value PV calculations, and derived metrics like industry growth and adjusted valuation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, and associated test references.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of all major frontend files including utilities, components, hooks, and DCF logic.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables and theming for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry file setting up metadata, favicon, and loading the React application root.
frontend/scripts/check-required-generate: Node script verifying required generated image assets exist before building and failing the build if missing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app wiring inputs, actions, results display, and developer validation checks with UI layout.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: Component rendering action buttons for example inputs, reset, shareable link copying, and optional dev check.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Renders a form for all DCF input fields with validation messages and change handling.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: Displays intrinsic or actual per‑share value calculations with animated output and selection buttons.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Implements all DCF-related calculations, including hidden intermediate values and price metrics.
frontend/src/features/dcf/dcf.ts: Empty placeholder file for DCF logic.
frontend/src/features/dcf/devChecks.ts: Runs verification tests comparing calculated DCF values against expected results with tolerance checks.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines the DcfInputs interface and provides default, example, and verification input presets.
frontend/src/features/dcf/sensitivity.ts: Empty placeholder for sensitivity analysis features.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Validates DCF input fields and exposes helpers for retrieving field-level error messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and maintains a backend actor based on authentication state, refreshing dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Provides a hook for animating numeric values using a smooth count‑up effect.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and provider for managing Internet Identity login state using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Maps frontend DCF inputs to backend format and runs backend DCF calculations via react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Syncs DCF input values with URL query parameters and generates shareable links.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light/dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/csv.ts: Empty placeholder file for CSV utilities.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Contains number formatting helpers for currency, large values, percentages, and comma-separated numbers.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Provides numeric parsing helpers including safe number parsing and percent conversion.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing rollback requirements and known issues around formula calculation errors.
